title: BEM-840 replace dispatch tool
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','governance/dispatch_queue_v2','governance/dispatch_results_v2','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
# New V2 queue does not use JSON. It is key=value lines to avoid JSONDecodeError class entirely.
proc=Path('scripts/process_dispatch_queue_v2.sh')
proc.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -u
mkdir -p governance/dispatch_queue_v2 governance/dispatch_results_v2 governance/state
now="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
printf '{"status":"v2_processor_started","time":"%s"}\n' "$now" > governance/state/dispatch_queue_v2_processor_marker.json
count=0
for f in governance/dispatch_queue_v2/*.env; do
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  count=$((count+1))
  base="$(basename "$f" .env)"
  out="governance/dispatch_results_v2/${base}.status.json"
  workflow=""
  ref="main"
  while IFS='=' read -r k v; do
    case "$k" in
      workflow) workflow="$v" ;;
      ref) ref="$v" ;;
    esac
  done < "$f"
  if [ -z "$workflow" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"missing_workflow","queue_file":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$now" > "$out"
    mv "$f" "${f}.done" 2>/dev/null || true
    continue
  fi
  if [ -z "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
    printf '{"status":"token_missing","queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
    continue
  fi
  if gh workflow run "$workflow" --ref "$ref" >/tmp/dispatch_v2.out 2>/tmp/dispatch_v2.err; then
    printf '{"status":"dispatch_attempted","exit_code":0,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"
    mv "$f" "${f}.done" 2>/dev/null || true
  else
    code=$?
    err="$(cat /tmp/dispatch_v2.err 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/"/'"'"'/g')"
    printf '{"status":"dispatch_failed","exit_code":%s,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","error":"%s","time":"%s"}\n' "$code" "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$err" "$now" > "$out"
  fi
done
printf '{"status":"v2_processor_finished","items":%s,"time":"%s"}\n' "$count" "$now" > governance/state/dispatch_queue_v2_processor_done.json
echo "dispatch_queue_v2_items=$count"
''')
commit=Path('scripts/commit_dispatch_queue_v2_results.sh')
commit.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
git add -A governance/dispatch_results_v2 governance/dispatch_queue_v2 governance/state/dispatch_queue_v2_processor_marker.json governance/state/dispatch_queue_v2_processor_done.json || true
git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No dispatch v2 result changes" || git commit -m "BEM-840 dispatch queue v2 results"
git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
git push || true
''')
# Add V2 steps to codex-runner once, independent of broken legacy workflow_dispatch_queue.
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
rt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
insert='''
      - name: Process dispatch queue v2
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: bash scripts/process_dispatch_queue_v2.sh
      - name: Commit dispatch queue v2 results
        if: always()
        run: bash scripts/commit_dispatch_queue_v2_results.sh
'''
changed_runner=False
if runner.exists() and 'scripts/process_dispatch_queue_v2.sh' not in rt:
    marker='      - name: Complete job'
    if marker in rt:
        rt=rt.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
    else:
        rt=rt+insert
    runner.write_text(rt)
    changed_runner=True
# Create one clean V2 Claude dispatch request.
q=Path('governance/dispatch_queue_v2/bem840_claude_dispatch.env')
q.write_text('workflow=claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml'+sep+'ref=main'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'dispatch_tool_v2_installed','design':'replace legacy JSON queue with env queue v2','queue_file':str(q),'runner_changed':changed_runner,'created_at':created,'next_action':'run tick and verify dispatch_results_v2, runtime state, and real Claude response'}
Path('governance/state/bem840_replace_dispatch_tool_v2.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_replace_dispatch_tool_v2.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Replace Dispatch Tool V2 | INSTALLED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick and verify dispatch_results_v2 + Claude runtime + real response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Dispatch tool V2 installed. Next: tick and verify.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(proc),str(commit),str(runner),str(q),'governance/state/bem840_replace_dispatch_tool_v2.json','governance/reports/bem840_replace_dispatch_tool_v2.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Replaced broken JSON workflow dispatch queue with Dispatch Queue V2: key-value queue, isolated result directory, marker files, commit script, and Codex Runner integration')
"""
No issue comments.
